entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, a legume crop studied for GRF and GIF gene families

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a legume crop studied for GRF and GIF gene families

entities.name: GRF
entities.description: Growth-regulating factor gene family encoding plant-specific transcription factors involved in development and stress response

entities.name: GIF
entities.description: GRF-interacting factor gene family encoding plant-specific transcription factors involved in development and stress response

entities.name: PLANT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of growth and maturation in plants

entities.name: STRESS RESPONSE
entities.description: The biological process by which plants react to environmental stressors

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying all members of a specific gene family across the entire genome

entities.name: EXPRESSION PROFILING
entities.description: The measurement of gene activity levels in specific tissues or developmental stages

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to group proteins into clades based on evolutionary relationships

entities.name: IN-SILICO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Computational analysis used to determine chromosomal location, sub-cellular localization, and regulatory elements

entities.name: SYNTENY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of the physical colocalization of genetic loci to determine genomic topology

entities.name: DIPLOID-POLYPLOID TOPOLOGY
entities.description: A specific genomic arrangement of genes observed in pigeonpea
